voice_match_evidence: Chapter-2 voice is didactic, corrective, slightly stern. The 2.40 engineering layer matches: 'Krishna here advances a narrow claim with two negations and one promise — all concerning a specific discipline (karma-yoga, action without attachment to fruits) and NOT effort generically.' The corrective tone (explicitly naming the standard misreading and guarding against it) is exactly the voice the chapter requires for verses prone to misreading. The chaos-drill scenario is operationally specific (week numbers, channel context, prior-drill coverage of adjacent failure modes). Coherent with 2.30 (corrective on dishonest migrations), 2.36 (corrective on social-pressure misreadings), 2.38 (corrective on stoic-suppression misreadings), 2.47 (corrective on outcome-blindness).
